rulings.Case Title: MARIA ALVARADO et al VS. SERVIO T GOMEZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For Order Dismissing Action For Failure To Bring To Trial Within Five Years
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, APRIL 14, 2008 LINE 1. DEFENDANTs GOLD KEY REALTY AND INVESTMENTS AND JORGE CARCAMO'S MOTION For Order Dismissing Action For Failure To Bring To Trial Within Five Years IS CONTINUED TO MAY 15, 2008. THE COURT REQUIRES THAT THE MOVING PARTY IS TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A SET OF COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR PAPERS. WHEN SUBMITTING THE DUPLICATE COPIES, PLEASE PROVIDE A COVER LETTER TO THE COURT REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE SO THAT THE COURTESY COPIES WON'T BE MISPLACED WHEN RECEIVED. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: ALVIN RATLIFF VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, APRIL 14, 2008 LINE 2. DEFENDANT M. SLAYEN & ASSOCIATES, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT COMPLIED WITH C.C.P. SECTION 1008(B) AND HAS FAILED TO EXPLAIN WHY THE SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES WERE NOT SERVED PRIOR TO THE FILING OF THE ORIGINAL MOTION OR WHAT NEW LAW OR FACTS HAVE BEEN DEVELOPED SINCE THE FILING OF THE ORIGINAL MOTION. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: RETIREMENT BOARD OF THE SAN FRANCISCO EMPLOYEES' VS. LYDIA KASHEVAROFF et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Seal Previously Filed Dec.'S Of Rebecca Liu And Jay Huish In Support Of Mtn Summary Adjudication And To File Redacted Dec.'S Of Rebecca Liu And Jay Huish In Suuport Of Mtn For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, APRIL 14, 2008 LINE 6. PLAINTIFF RETIREMENT BOARD OF THE SAN FRANCISCO EMPLOYEES' MOTION To Seal Previously Filed DECLARTIONS Of Rebecca Liu And Jay Huish In Support Of MOTION Summary Adjudication And To File Redacted DECLARATIONS Of Rebecca Liu And Jay Huish In Suuport Of MOTION For Summary Adjudication: IF PLAINTIFF COMPLIES WITH CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT SECTION 2.551, THE MOTION TO SEAL SHALL BE GRANTED. THE DOCUMENTS PREVIOUSLY SUBMITTED DO NOT COMPLY WITH RULE 2.551. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: BARBARA HELD-DEVRIES VS. DANIEL LEIBOWITZ et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, APRIL 14, 2008 LINE 18. DEFENDANTS DANIEL LEIBOWITZ AND, LING BUSCHE'S MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED AS TO FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD THE TERMS OF THE CONTRACT OR TO ATTACH THE WRITTEN CONTRACT. OVERRULED AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO PUNITIVE DAMAGES. THE REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS DENIED. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: GARRETT VAN WAGONER VS. CARREN SUE SHAGLEY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, APRIL 14, 2008 LINE 11. CROSS-DEFENDANTS GARRETT WAGONER AND LORI WAGONER'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. THE LISTING AGREEMENT IS SUSCEPTIBLE TO THE INTERPRETATION THAT THE BROKER WAS ENTITLED TO A COMMISSION UPON THE COMPLETION OF THE SALE. THAT OCCURED AND BASED ON THE PLEADINGS, THE CROSS-COMPLAINT COMES WITHIN THE HOLDING IN BABCOCK V HOUSTON (1973) 33 CAL APP 3D 858. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: RONALD HOWARD et al VS. OMNI HOTELS MGT COMPANY et al*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO SAN DIEGO COUNTY*****
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Transfer Venue
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, APRIL 14, 2008 LINE 12. DEFENDANT OMNI HOTELS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION'S Motion To Transfer Venue IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT SHOWN THE LOCATION DESIGNATED BY DEFENDANT CORPORATIONS AS THEIR PRINCIPAL PLACE OF BUSINESS AS REQUIRED BY CORPORATIONS CODE SECTION 2105(A)(3). ACCORDINGLY, VENUE APPEARS PROPER IN THIS COUNTY. THE COURT EXERCISES IT DISCRETION UNDER C.C.P. SECTION 397(C) TO TRANSFER THE CASE TO SAN DIEGO COUNTY WHERE THE INJURY OCCURRED. THERE ARE NO WITNESSES IN SAN FRANCISCO AND TRAVELING TO SAN DIEGO FOR TRIAL DOES NOT CONSTITUTE A MATERIAL BURDEN TO PLAINTIFF OR A BURDEN ANY GREATER THAT TRAVELING TO SAN FRANCISCO FOR TRIAL. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: COX CALIFORNIA TELECOM LLC (U5684-C) VS. GLOBAL NAPS CALIFORNIA INC (U-6449-C)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Hearing On Pl'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, APRIL 14, 2008 LINE 14. PETITIONER COX CALIFORNIA TELECOM, L.L.C.'S (U5684-C) PETITIONER COX CALIFORNIA TELECOM, L.L.C.'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award IS DENIED. IT APPEARS UNDER 24.8.5 AND 24.9, THAT THE PARTIES HAD THE OPTION OF INITIATING AN ACTION "IN ANY REGULATORY OR JUDICIAL FORUM OF COMPETENT JURISDICTION" AND TO "FILE A COMPLAINT WITH THE COMMISSION TO RESOLVE SUCH ISSUES OR PROCEED WITH ANY OTHER REMEDY PURSUANT TO LAW OR EQUITY." WHEN THE COMMISSION'S RULING BECOMES FINAL, PLAINTIFF MAY BE ABLE TO SEEK ENFORCEMENT OF THE JUDGMENT IN COURT BUT THAT DOES NOT APPEAR TO BE THE BASIS OF THIS PETITION. =(302/PJM/AY)
